subject: Big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
| | | Today I was honored to receive the endorsement of AgPAC! Dear Friend , I want to share with you some incredible news! **Today I was honored to receive the endorsement of AgPAC** , the Arizona Farm Bureau’s political organization.
> “Tiffany Shedd is a true Arizonan, true westerner and true agriculturalist,” AgPAC chairwoman Sherry Saylor said. “We are always thrilled when Arizona Farm Bureau members are willing to enter the political arena, especially when that member is as qualified as Tiffany.”
Help me keep up the momentum by making a contribution today! | | [MAKE A DONATION](http://email.connectstrategic.com/t/j-l-ntdluyk-jriylrtihd-y/)
---
My family and I have long supported the Arizona Farm Bureau’s mission to engage their membership to preserve and improve the agriculture industry. Arizona Farm Bureau is a steady hand that has kept Arizona a state that values hard work, family, individual freedom, production, stewardship of our land and natural resources, as well as providing much needed common sense to our legislative process.
As a farmer, I look forward to partnering with Arizona agriculture to make Arizona’s next 100 years even better than the last.
Thank you Farm Bureau for your continued support!
Tiffany Shedd

name: The White House
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
1600 Daily REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e2cc858ffba608c36d25ed0d27cf983a98c566e160550f732e654e01e759e43c1cebe6f5d5f337baf8a6714863d8ecd9b

Trump Isn’t Attacking NATO. He’s Strengthening It.

- The Washington Post

“If allies don’t invest in real, usable military capabilities, NATO will become irrelevant,” American Enterprise Institute Fellow Marc Thiessen explains. “NATO needs some tough love, and Trump is delivering it. Thanks to him, the alliance will be stronger as a result.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7ef442901dd0e6164fa4913e0d4fe98484034451effeabd36807cc636f5eec150f31a6ab8a389ba9bcd41e40db0d91d1a6

Brett Kavanaugh is an Excellent Pick for the Supreme Court

- New York Post

“Once again staying true to his campaign promises, President Trump just nominated Brett Kavanaugh as his pick to replace Justice Anthony Kennedy on the Supreme Court. It’s an excellent choice — though the coming wave of fear-mongering may hide that fact for a while,” the New York Post Editorial Board writes. “Judge Kavanaugh, 53, is widely seen as one of the top legal minds of his generation.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7ef786b9c3a20f200b1e6c3dc47ae1082204084f621f2d1de3e598e7569863d29bd6a79cad709a1a058716892317ecb2c4

At the NATO Summit, Trump is Standing Up for Fair Treatment for America

- Fox News

“Throughout history, leaders of entrenched power structures have not reacted well to change. But President Trump has courage to take them on when necessary,” David Bossie writes in Fox News. “The bottom line is that if all 29 countries in NATO made good on their 2 percent commitment, the U.S. taxpayer would be paying less.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e4a61fde480a317edbe15c883e1c023ad61a61b6ae4068a283bc34f7c13fe45f774a1019b2d063a238b8c53961e3918f0

NATO Chief Thanks Trump for Pushing Allies to Boost Defense Spending

- The Daily Caller

“NATO’s top civilian leader thanked President Donald Trump on Tuesday for pushing alliance members to boost their own defense spending, saying his blunt criticism is part of the reason why more allies are expected to hit spending targets this year,” Will Racke reports. “It is clearly having an impact,” NATO Secretary General Jens Stoltenberg said.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e502d888bfbf3fe2f589522a82a0dfb531c9fa36679c63b586ee64697f9e4d8be2228ad4b7c4639e7d98d203abc6bcd39

McConnell: Far-Left Scare Tactics Won’t Stop Kavanaugh's Confirmation

- Cincinnati Enquirer

“Judge Kavanaugh’s qualifications are so obvious, and his reputation so excellent, that these unhinged attacks may be all that remains in the far left’s arsenal. But the American people will not fall for these tricks. Neither should the United States Senate,” writes Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY).

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7ea3a38e90327b3b1d7ed5d5094bdd1b25abda813a37b94845dd1738b694def4e06c8944d0036ba850d756a091332e96f6

Paid Family Leave is an Investment in America’s Families — It Deserves Bipartisan Support

- Fox News

First Daughter and Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump writes that paid family leave is an investment in America’s families and deserves bipartisan support. “Republicans are at the table, with sincere interest and rolled-up sleeves, looking for smart policy solutions that will empower American working families,” she writes.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e13a119fffa6fe192c91068cf160f6706f4fc2c042c5b6bf12ea3f6af35a2d13a073331f66b1f4005efed5b8cb68af725
Politico: “Voters Oppose Abolishing ICE”

- Politico

“A new POLITICO/Morning Consult poll shows that most voters oppose eliminating Immigration and Customs Enforcement — the homeland security agency some liberal Democrats have called for abolishing,” Steven Shepard reports.

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e96c5e9ccc7f6ca57e6d7f4c1cd52bc2d8eefd2b11dfe0178a37ec1a2674c3b1600e12bc1ade896f2413e2875b5eec8fd
Poll: Most ‘Better Off Financially’ Under Trump than Obama

- Washington Examiner

“For the second time in two weeks, a new national survey has found that most Americans -- and especially Hispanics -- feel that they are better off under President Trump than they were under former President Obama,” Paul Bedard writes. The Emerson College survey found “that 42 percent feel better off, compared to 26 percent who feel worse off.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7eac96eef3570a58dcf222de5d5f49b34dce04ee641daf4a8d9d46b609e09c11ec15fa3baf6b638fe831b9cf0626bce861
Arizona Governor Doug Ducey: Calls to Abolish ICE are Wrong and Reckless

- USA Today

Gov. Doug Ducey (R-AZ) condemned the left’s calls to abolish ICE this week. “In border communities, law enforcement agencies like ICE aren't the enemy: they're a lifeline,” he writes. “There, this isn’t a political debate — it’s real life. The impact of illegal drug cartels, human trafficking, and child sex trafficking on communities and families is real and raw.”

-------------------------

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e78016f9c0a966467a4f21cf72de809e25050186a47887557f9c2e3046ccb96d8f42708e0ff98170651cd19f781492525
Trump's Tariffs Revive Granite City Jobs, and Optimism

- Chicago Tribune

Samantha Bomkamp reports that in Granite City, Illinois, a steel plant has reopened thanks to President Trump’s tariffs. “Nearly half of the returning 800 U.S. Steel jobs will be filled with employees who were laid off in 2015 when the plant was idled,” she writes.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e8c219f196a57227796a692cddb62bc19aaccbac5b7de1368192e2220664cc1d85d458c4bf01fc2e6e521829e480b2c6b
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=5641d3316dabfa7e7c97077be45c9d376ee45ac37dc3e99b995bb53c5bb56ea8e46cc2c14bc28a3f68237d823b6eace9bc05258db7a6397e
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d481b4dd50dd287a89bc4fda17f4772bacbe42cb7422b21877a76f44abf73881c702840a6189c036afe1fe0aef62044262a9822576c95f252a
Unsubscribe

name: Paul Davis
subject: Celebrate another year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aKBKZseTizB0YfdCfhsFCUjNoO6ovEWFxg9Rz_QTrwY=/tP2tEL2xigJXvFWPUMBkal4JjxlP_81NnOevV-zamWE=?gpsid=13_36_2006&ms=em18_180714_BdayTY_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&refcode=em18_180714_BdayTY_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180714_BdayTY_fnd_gq_act__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Peter,

First of all, thank you for the card.

It was great spending my birthday with my family and taking a break from the campaign to celebrate another year. It gave me a moment to look back on everything we've been through in the past eleven months, and look forward to everything that's to come.

Receiving the card from all of you reminded me why I'm running for Congress.

My campaign started because I knew we deserved a leader who would listen to solutions from anyone who has great ideas, regardless of political party, in order to make life better for all Kansans. And now, with your support, it's grown into so much more, so seeing all of your names and receiving all your well-wishes meant a lot to me.

So again, from the bottom of my heart thank you,

Paul

name: Laney A. [digital director]
subject: Will you be part of Amy's team?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

I don't have to tell you how hard Senator Klobuchar works to make a difference for Minnesota, but [**did you know how many supporters like you are signing up to volunteer in this critical election year?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8pIigNo3EAcxROmZGeUqo%2Bhdvqd%2BMk2z)

It's a lot -- and with the chaos in Washington, it's never been more important for our grassroots team here in Minnesota to be as strong as possible.

**Will you join the team and pledge to volunteer?**

[**You can march in a parade, write a letter to the editor, share Amy 's news online, or even take a lawn sign for your yard. Just click here to sign up!**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2F28QeGSaxWUErDQot1UuF%2Bhdvqd%2BMk2z)

By signing up you'll be part of a team with members in all 87 Minnesota counties. You'll be part of a team that's made over 40,000 grassroots contributions, marched in parades in every part of our state, and stood up to the special interests by demanding that we tackle climate change, save net neutrality, and protect people with pre-existing conditions from being denied health care.

The special interests know that Team Klobuchar is tough, but now it's time to show them just how strong -- and how big -- we really are.

As the summer heats up, can we count on you to [**join thousands of other volunteers across Minnesota and help Amy at this critical time?**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ZwunwD3MZRUZfH2qoUJs3Ohdvqd%2BMk2z)

Thanks,

Laney A.
Digital Director

name: Ashley Walukevich
subject: Office Opening TODAY!
body:
Derek,
**We're having a party today, and we want YOU there!**
**TODAY** , Saturday, July 14th we are officially opening our first NHGOP Victory Field Office!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends,

This week, I asked you what issues you cared about most.

Many of you said you cared most about jobs and our economy. As a business leader, I raised wages and created over 800 jobs in Northern Indiana. I know what it takes to grow our economy and increase wages and benefits for hardworking Hoosiers.

Others said you're most worried about health care. I ran a company focused on improving patient care -- and I'm committed to making health care more affordable and accessible for all Hoosiers.

[**On these issues and more, I 'm running for Congress to bring opportunity to hardworking Indiana families. But I can't do it without your support. Contribute $5 now to fund our campaign and flip the 2nd District blue.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/BYWvReUKl6k2mzPPC00DuAUFoTjAfwGPRSA2h-b5eow=/1I7Q370_jGNsIkv9NSKj34z-CTTPBtGPkUlmqKkL5f8=?refcode=em180714)

I want to share with you just a couple of responses to our survey:

Ann from South Bend wrote, "I am very concerned about Medicare and Social Security as I am 62 and have worked very hard since I was 14. I want to retire without too much fear."

Harold from Silver Lake wrote, "We need to return our government to a government for the people instead of a government for the wealthiest."

I'm running to make sure that Hoosiers like Ann and Harold have a voice in Washington. I want to bring accountability and integrity to Congress and fight for the people of the 2nd District.

**One of the most important ways you can show you 're with me is to donate now. Chip ****in to****power our campaign and say you 're standing with me in the fight ahead.**

Which is why Tim Kaine is strongly urging the U.S. Secretary of Health and Human Services to take swift action to stabilize the healthcare insurance marketplace.

subject: This is Critical
body:
I wanted to step away from the campaign trail for a moment to reach out to some of my most dependable supporters.

We just released a brand-new campaign ad that is really starting to turn heads around Indiana. We are exposing Sleepin’ Joe’s continued lies and setting the record straight on my record of conservative leadership.

It’s critical that we keep this ad running through the summer, so I need your help. If you can chip in just $25 today (www.mikebraunforindiana.com/promoteourad), it will help us ensure that Hoosiers everywhere get to see the truth that Sleepin’ Joe doesn’t want them to hear.

This election could very well be determined by the things we do or don’t do right now. So give today and let’s drain the DC Swamp together!

Mike
Sent from my iPhone

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you are no longer interested you can unsubscribe instantly:
